Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The DataFormatsAreBinaryEquivalent method returns true if the supplied source and allocated data formats use binary compatible data encodings.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static bool DataFormatsAreBinaryEquivalent(SourceDataFormat sourceDataFormat, DataFormat dataFormat);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The source data format to compare.
The allocated data format to compare against.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the two data formats use the same binary data encoding, false otherwise.
